operational_knowledge_units.title: Overall System - AGV Status page
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The 'AGV Status' page within the Overall System displays the current status of the AGVs.
observed_evidence: Slide text includes: 'Overall System', 'AGV Status', and 'This page will show the current status of the AGVs'.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: UI concept: Overall System > AGV Status page shows the current status of AGVs.
